name: Lead Generation & Data Enrichment
intro: Tools that build, enrich and activate B2B lead lists — from sourcing contacts to launching outreach.

name: Workflow Automation
intro: Platforms that connect your apps and automate repetitive processes, from simple triggers to complex backend workflows.

name: Project & Work Management
intro: Work platforms that centralise tasks, projects and team operations with built-in automation.

name: AI & Agent Development
intro: APIs and frameworks for building LLM-powered apps and autonomous AI agents into your products and workflows.

name: CRM & Sales Automation
intro: Customer and workflow platforms that automate pipelines, sales processes and enterprise operations.

name: AI Content & Conversational
intro: AI tools that generate marketing content and automate conversations across chat and social channels.
